assertions.assertion: Client secret uses Type = IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateBase64 or JsonWebKey
Uses GrantTypes.Code as the grant type
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows GrantTypes.Code for web apps.

assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearerClientAuthentication() on the IdentityServer builder
Includes RedirectUris pointing to the web application
Does NOT use a shared secret (no Sha256() call)
